nl_query: How many orders were placed last month?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders WHERE created_at >= DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW() - INTERVAL '1 month') AND created_at < DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW())

nl_query: What are the top 5 customers by total revenue?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT c.customer_id, c.name, SUM(o.amount) AS total_revenue FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.name ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 5

nl_query: Show all products that are out of stock.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT product_id, name, stock_quantity FROM products WHERE stock_quantity = 0

nl_query: What is the average order value by month this year?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) AS month, AVG(amount) AS avg_order_value FROM orders WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created_at) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM NOW()) GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

nl_query: List all employees in the Engineering department.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT e.employee_id, e.name, e.email FROM employees e JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.department_id WHERE d.name = 'Engineering'

nl_query: How many users registered each day in the last 7 days?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT DATE(created_at) AS day, COUNT(*) AS registrations FROM users WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY day ORDER BY day

nl_query: Which products have been ordered more than 100 times?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT p.product_id, p.name, COUNT(oi.order_id) AS order_count FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id, p.name HAVING COUNT(oi.order_id) > 100 ORDER BY order_count DESC

nl_query: What is the total revenue per region for this quarter?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT region, SUM(amount) AS total_revenue FROM orders WHERE created_at >= DATE_TRUNC('quarter', NOW()) GROUP BY region ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

nl_query: Find all customers who have not placed any orders.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT c.customer_id, c.name, c.email FROM customers c LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE o.order_id IS NULL

nl_query: What is the most popular product category by number of orders?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT cat.category_name, COUNT(oi.order_item_id) AS item_count FROM categories cat JOIN products p ON cat.category_id = p.category_id JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id GROUP BY cat.category_name ORDER BY item_count DESC LIMIT 1

nl_query: Show the monthly active users for the past 6 months.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', last_login) AS month, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS mau FROM users WHERE last_login >= NOW() - INTERVAL '6 months' GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

nl_query: Which orders were placed but not yet shipped?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT order_id, customer_id, created_at, status FROM orders WHERE status = 'pending'

nl_query: What is the average salary by department?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT d.name AS department, AVG(e.salary) AS avg_salary FROM employees e JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.department_id GROUP BY d.name ORDER BY avg_salary DESC

nl_query: List the top 10 most recently created users.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT user_id, name, email, created_at FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10

nl_query: How many distinct products were ordered last week?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT oi.product_id) AS distinct_products FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'

nl_query: What percentage of orders were returned?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'returned' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS return_rate_pct FROM orders

nl_query: Show products with a price above the average product price.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT product_id, name, price FROM products WHERE price > (SELECT AVG(price) FROM products) ORDER BY price DESC

nl_query: Find all orders with more than 5 items.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT o.order_id, o.customer_id, COUNT(oi.order_item_id) AS item_count FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id GROUP BY o.order_id, o.customer_id HAVING COUNT(oi.order_item_id) > 5

nl_query: What is the revenue growth month over month this year?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) AS month, SUM(amount) AS revenue, LAG(SUM(amount)) OVER (ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at)) AS prev_revenue FROM orders WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created_at) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM NOW()) GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

nl_query: Which 3 employees have the highest number of sales this year?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT e.employee_id, e.name, COUNT(o.order_id) AS sales_count FROM employees e JOIN orders o ON e.employee_id = o.employee_id WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.created_at) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM NOW()) GROUP BY e.employee_id, e.name ORDER BY sales_count DESC LIMIT 3
